_comment: Per-deploy run modifiers. Outpost rolls 1-2 per branch; effects fold into dungeon.gd at run start. Effects are flat additions or multipliers — see dungeon._apply_run_modifiers for the engine glue. min_tier filters which branches a modifier can roll on (some are too punishing for tier 1 starters).

modifiers.name: Treasure Hoard
modifiers.desc: +1 chest per floor, loot rarity bias.

modifiers.name: Glittering
modifiers.desc: Loot drops one rarity tier higher.

modifiers.name: Bloodlust
modifiers.desc: Enemies hit harder; gold drops boosted.

modifiers.name: Boss Hunt
modifiers.desc: Branch boss drops twice as much loot.
